what_it_does: This JSON file enumerates a batch of source files from the claude-ds project, recording each file's project name, relative path, and absolute root directory as an allocation manifest for interpretive/build-prep processing.
observations: Contains six entries, all from the same project 'claude-ds' and the same root directory '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds'.
Lists JSX implementation files (Badge.jsx, Button.jsx, Card.jsx), TypeScript declaration files (Button.d.ts, Card.d.ts), and an HTML file (component-library.html).
Each entry uses only three keys: project, path, and root.
No code symbols, dependency edges, timestamps, or batch rationale are present.
standouts: A single batch mixes runtime components (.jsx), type declarations (.d.ts), and a static HTML catalog.
All entries share an identical absolute root path.
conventions: Flat array of uniform objects with project/path/root keys.
Relative paths are rooted under the project directory.
Batch naming follows a wave/batch folder convention: wave-002/alloc/batch-022.json.
concerns: Absolute root path is hardcoded to a local filesystem location, limiting portability.
No explanation of why these specific files are grouped in this batch.
No versioning or generated-vs-source flag for the HTML catalog or .d.ts files.
notes: A minimal path-only allocation manifest for six claude-ds component files, intended for downstream interpretation or build staging.
questions: What criteria selected these six files for wave-002, batch-022?
Is component-library.html a generated catalog or hand-authored source?
Are Button.d.ts and Card.d.ts manually maintained or generated from the .jsx files?
purpose_vs_actual: The file serves as a batch allocation manifest listing file paths, which matches its apparent purpose, though it omits metadata that would explain the batch composition.
intention_signals: It appears designed to feed a build-prep or interpretive pipeline a scoped, file-level inventory of design-system components for a specific wave and batch.
contribution: Provides a deterministic, minimal file inventory that a fused system can use to locate and stage the listed claude-ds component files for further analysis or build steps.
summary_for_embedding: A JSON allocation manifest listing six files from the claude-ds design-system project, including JSX components, TypeScript declarations, and an HTML component library, all under a common root path.
intention_for_embedding: To record which source files belong to wave-002 batch-022 of the interpret/build-prep pipeline for the one-system ledger.
